summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QR Scanning feature for RX Expresss. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified Admin QR Scanning page with all tabs (Packages, Scan History, Analytics), QR Scanner modal with camera and manual entry options, and Pharmacy portal scan button.

backend: GET /api/admin/scans/stats - Get scan statistics (total_scans, recent_scans_24h, scans_by_action, top_scanners)
POST /api/orders/scan - Returns 404 for non-existent QR code
frontend: Admin Dashboard - QR Scanning tab in sidebar navigation (data-testid='nav-scanning')
Admin QR Scanning page - Stats cards (Total Scans, Last 24 Hours, Pickups, Deliveries)
Admin QR Scanning page - Packages tab with table (QR Code, Order, Recipient, Status, Scanned, Requirements, Actions)
Admin QR Scanning page - Scan History tab with table (QR Code, Action, Scanned By, Time, Location)
Admin QR Scanning page - Analytics tab with charts (Scans by Action, Top Scanners)
Admin QR Scanning page - Scan Package button (data-testid='admin-scan-btn')
QR Scanner modal - Opens correctly with AdminVerify badge
QR Scanner modal - Open Camera Scanner button (data-testid='start-scan-btn')
QR Scanner modal - Manual QR code entry field (data-testid='manual-qr-input')
QR Scanner modal - Scan button for manual entry (data-testid='manual-scan-btn')
QR Scanner modal - Error handling shows 'Package not found' toast for invalid QR
Pharmacy portal - Scan Package button in header (data-testid='scan-package-btn')
Pharmacy portal - QR Scanner modal opens with Pickup badge

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for QR scanning components
QRScanner component is reusable across Admin and Pharmacy portals with different action types
Backend API endpoints properly enforce admin authentication
Error handling works correctly - shows appropriate error messages for invalid QR codes
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing data and error handling for non-existent packages
context_for_next_testing_agent: QR Scanning feature is fully functional. Admin can view packages, scan history, analytics, and verify packages via QR code. Pharmacy portal has scan button for pickup verification. Backend endpoints at /api/admin/scans, /api/admin/scans/stats, /api/admin/packages, /api/admin/packages/verify/{qr_code}, and /api/orders/scan are all working. html5-qrcode library is installed for camera scanning.

mocked_apis.Google Maps API: Not configured - geocoding returns mock data
